birth,
he will be bereft of wealth, be a servant, will speak undesirable words, be untruthful, will win the
hearts of old women, will have bad friends, will be addicted to women, will serve other
95

women, be not outspoken, will have strong sight, be related to numerous assignments and be
a fool.
5-6. If Saturn occupies Gemini,
one will contract debts and imprisonments, will toil, will have vanity in disposition will consecrate
by hymns and prayers, be bereft of virtues, be always in hide-out, be libidinous, cunning,
wicked and fond of wandering and of sports.
7-8. SATURN IN CANCER.
If Saturn is in Cancer, one will possess a beloved wife, be devoid of wealth in boyhood, will suffer
many diseases, be learned, motherless, soft-spoken, distinguished in acts, will always
contract diseases, will trouble others, be inimical to relatives, crooked, be kingly in his mid-life
and will enjoy growing pleasures.
9-10. SATURN IN LEO.
